description: Let workspace admins manage membership and review changes.

userStories.title: Inviting workspace members
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that I can add people without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: An admin can submit an email invite for a workspace member.
The invite is recorded for the target workspace.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Changing member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so that access matches responsibility.
acceptanceCriteria: An admin can switch a member between viewer, editor, and admin.
Role changes persist for the selected member.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Revoking workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that removed users no longer retain membership.
acceptanceCriteria: An admin can revoke a member from the workspace.
Revoked members no longer appear as active workspace members.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Recording membership audit events
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership changes recorded in an audit log so that access changes are traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite, role change, and revoke actions create audit entries.
Audit entries capture actor, target member, action, and timestamp.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Viewing recent membership changes
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can audit activity quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings show recent membership changes.
The view reflects stored audit entries in reverse chronological order.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
